title: UAE-Türkiye trade nearly triples under CEPA agreement
description: UAE and Türkiye strengthen their CEPA-driven partnership, with non-oil trade surging to $45.2b in 2025 and fresh MoUs expanding business collaboration.

title: 'One of the best Stephen King adaptations yet' is streaming now
description: The emotional thriller has hailed as one of the best films released last year

title: Electricity tariffs to rise by 18% for high-consumption users
description: The Public Utilities Commission of Sri Lanka (PUCSL) has announced a decision to increase electricity tariffs by 18% for the second and third quarters of 2026.

title: Indian Cricketers Face Consequences for Missing Dope Tests
description: Indian cricketers Yashasvi Jaiswal and Shafali Verma have been issued notices by NADA for missing dope tests, raising concerns about compliance with anti-doping protocols. Both players are part of the Registered Testing Pool and are required to provide their whereabouts for testing. The BCCI has confirmed the situation and is investigating the circumstances surrounding the missed tests. With cricket's return to the Olympics, adherence to these regulations is more critical than ever. The consequences of missing tests can be severe, including potential suspensions, as highlighted by past incidents involving other players.

title: IPL 2026: Busted! Virat Kohli's match ticket turns out to be AI-generated
description: Lucknow Super Giants secured their maiden home win in IPL 2026 against Royal Challengers Bengaluru, but the match was marred by the discovery of fake AI-generated tickets. Police apprehended four individuals from Chhattisgarh for using AI tools and graphic software to create and sell counterfeit tickets outside the Ekana Stadium.

title: Memory Lane: Long-gone shops and pubs on Dunfermline’s Bruce Street
description: There will be a Bruce Lecture in the Canmore Room of Dunfermline Carnegie Library and Galleries on Wednesday, June 3.

title: Infinix NOTE 60 Ultra Design by Pininfarina Price is PHP 32,999, Officially Announced!
description: The Infinix NOTE 60 Ultra brings together Italian-inspired luxury design, flagship imaging, and futuristic satellite communication in one sleek smartphone. Pininfarina Partnership: Infinix takes a major step toward the premium smartphone space with the NOTE 60 Ultra, featuring a sophisticated design created in collaboration with legendary Italian design house Pininfarina, known globally for its iconic automotive masterpieces. Flagship Features: The smartphone combines a 200MP ultra-resolution main camera, 50MP periscope telephoto lens, Global Two-Way Satellite Communication, and a unique Active Matrix Display that transforms the back panel into an interactive personalization hub. Premium Positioning: Arriving in four Italian-inspired colorways and carrying a retail price of PHP 32,999 , the NOTE 60 Ultra aims to deliver a more luxurious and expressive smartphone experience for users who want both standout style and flagship-level performance. The smartphone space is getting more competitive than ever, and brands are no longer just racing to offer better specs. Design, personality, and overall experience now matter just as much as raw performance. With the arrival of the Infinix NOTE 60 Ultra in the Philippines, Infinix is clearly aiming to push its NOTE series into a more premium and design-focused direction. Officially unveiled as the brand’s most performance-driven and visually ambitious smartphone yet, the NOTE 60 Ultra combines flagship-level hardware with refined aesthetics inspired by Italian craftsmanship. It is a device built not just to perform, but also to stand out. Available in Torino Black, Monza Red, Amalfi Blue, and Roma Silver, the smartphone offers four distinct personalities inspired by Italian culture and lifestyle. Each finish gives the device a more fashionable and expressive identity, allowing users to choose a variant that reflects their own style. A New Era for the NOTE Series One of the biggest highlights of the NOTE 60 Ultra is its partnership with legendary Italian design house Pininfarina. Globally recognized for its iconic automotive creations, Pininfarina brings its signature design language and craftsmanship to the smartphone category through this collaboration with Infinix. This partnership also marks Pininfarina’s first deep collaboration with a smartphone brand as part of its 95th anniversary celebration, making the project even more significant for both companies. The influence of Pininfarina can immediately be seen in the NOTE 60 Ultra’s sleek metal frame, refined curves, and distinctive rear camera styling. One particularly eye-catching detail is the integration of red tail light-inspired accents around the rear camera module, giving the device a sporty and futuristic personality reminiscent of high-end performance cars. Instead of relying purely on flashy finishes, the NOTE 60 Ultra appears to focus on balancing elegance and modern technology. The result is a smartphone that feels more premium and design-conscious compared to traditional devices in its category. Flagship-Level Imaging Experience Beyond aesthetics, the NOTE 60 Ultra is also packed with imaging hardware designed for users who create, capture, and share content regularly. Leading the system is a massive 200MP ultra-resolution main camera paired with a 50MP periscope telephoto lens. This setup aims to deliver both detailed shots and improved zoom capabilities, allowing users to capture everything from wide scenes to distant subjects with clarity. On the front, the device features a 32MP selfie camera designed for vibrant and detailed self-portraits, video calls, and social media content creation. For video enthusiasts, the NOTE 60 Ultra supports rear video recording at up to 4K resolution at 60FPS. This gives users access to smoother and more professional-looking footage directly from their smartphone, making the device appealing not only for casual users but also for aspiring content creators who want higher-quality mobile video capture. Connectivity Beyond Traditional Networks One of the most futuristic features introduced on the NOTE 60 Ultra is Infinix’s first-ever Global Two-Way Satellite Communication service. Powered by advanced Direct-to-Cell technology, the feature allows users to stay connected even in areas where traditional mobile networks may not be available. This expands communication possibilities far beyond normal cellular coverage. Unlike some existing satellite communication solutions that only work in limited regions, the NOTE 60 Ultra is designed to provide broader global accessibility. The system also features automatically managed carrier-style roaming, allowing users to access satellite calling services without needing additional registration processes. This addition positions the NOTE 60 Ultra as one of the more forward-looking devices in the market, especially for users who value reliable communication while traveling or exploring areas with unstable connectivity. A Hidden Display With Personality Another standout feature of the NOTE 60 Ultra is the innovative Active Matrix Display integrated into the back panel. At first glance, the display remains invisible, preserving the smartphone’s clean and premium appearance. Once activated, however, it transforms into a customizable interface capable of showing over 100 icons, emojis, signatures, and visual elements. This creates a more personalized smartphone experience, allowing users to express themselves in unique ways without permanently affecting the device’s minimalist aesthetic. The feature is also designed with efficiency in mind. Since the display intelligently powers down when not in use, it avoids unnecessary battery consumption while still offering an interactive and visually engaging experience. Adding even more personality to the phone are playful features like Pixel Pets Companion and mini-games such as dot dash and star blast, giving users small moments of entertainment directly from the device itself. A Premium Push for Infinix With the NOTE 60 Ultra, Infinix is making it clear that it wants to compete not just on affordability, but also on craftsmanship, innovation, and premium user experience. From its Pininfarina-designed exterior to its flagship imaging system, satellite communication capabilities, and customizable Active Matrix Display, the device introduces several features that help separate it from more conventional smartphones in the market. The Infinix NOTE 60 Ultra with 12GB RAM and 512GB ROM will soon be available in the Philippines for PHP 32,999 . Buyers can also unlock a Shopee-exclusive discount during its first sale on May 15. The smartphone will be available through Shopee, Lazada, and TikTok Shop. Meanwhile, users who want a similar design-focused experience can also check out the Infinix NOTE 60 Pro Pininfarina Edition , which will likewise be offered through Shopee, Lazada, and TikTok Shop. The official price of Infinix NOTE 60 Pro Pininfarina Edition in the Philippines is PHP 23,999 - based on its Lazada and Shopee listings - but you can enjoy discounts via limited vouchers and promos on those platforms. Source: TechPinas : Philippines' Technology News, Tips and Reviews Blog​ ~ Also, check out: AsiaTechConnect and MustSee Philippines

title: Astrological Insights: Major Planetary Alignments Favor These Three Zodiac Signs
description: A rare planetary alignment is set to occur, promising significant benefits for three zodiac signs while others may experience mixed outcomes. This article delves into the astrological predictions for each sign, highlighting the potential for financial gains, relationship dynamics, and personal growth. From Aries to Pisces, find out what the stars have in store for you and how to navigate the upcoming changes. Don't miss the insights that could shape your future!
